case_title: MEDI-SOFT,INC. VS. HELLER EHRMAN WHITE AND MCAULIFEE,A LIMITED LIABIL et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT WAS PERSONALLY SERVED ON JOHN OH ON 1/16/04, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 2/17/04 IF NO MOTION FILE BY JOHN HO.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDI-SOFT,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER EHRMAN WHITE AND MCAULIFEE,A LIMITED LIABIL TY PARTNERSHIP OH, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT HELLER EHRMAN WHITE AND MCAULIFEE,A LIMITED LIABIL TY PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF MEDI-SOFT,INC. OH, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL $392,589.65 PRINCIPAL, $37,688.60 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430,570.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER EHRMAN WHITE AND MCAULIFEE,A LIMITED LIABIL TY PARTNERSHIP OH, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL
